competitors.name: Trello
competitors.pricing_notes: Free tier (10 boards), Standard $5/user/mo, Premium $10/user/mo, Enterprise $17.50/user/mo
competitors.positioning: Visual project management using kanban boards. Targets small teams and individuals who prefer simplicity over complexity.
recent_activity: Launched AI-powered butler automation rules in 2024
Added timeline and calendar views to premium tier
competitors.review_sentiment_summary: Users love the visual, intuitive interface but complain about limited reporting, poor mobile experience, and feature ceiling for complex projects.

competitors.name: Asana
competitors.pricing_notes: Free (up to 15 users), Starter $10.99/user/mo, Advanced $24.99/user/mo, Enterprise custom
competitors.positioning: Work management platform for cross-functional teams. Emphasizes goal tracking, portfolio management, and workflow automation.
recent_activity: Launched Asana AI Studio for workflow automation
Expanded enterprise SSO and compliance features
competitors.review_sentiment_summary: Strong for mid-size teams but overwhelming for freelancers. Pricing increases sting as teams grow. AI features are promising but immature.
